entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for its pollination mechanisms.

entities.name: GENETIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where the plant is unable to produce functional pollen due to nuclear genetic factors.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where the plant is unable to produce functional pollen due to mitochondrial genetic factors.

entities.name: ICPL 85010
entities.description: A specific pigeon pea line used as a pollen source in the experiment.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: The controlled environment where the pigeon pea plants were grown.

entities.name: EVAPORATIVE COOLERS
entities.description: Equipment used to maintain temperature and provide airflow in the greenhouse.

entities.name: POD SETTING
entities.description: The formation of pods on the plant, used as an indicator of successful pollination.

entities.name: WIND POLLINATION
entities.description: The process of pollen transfer from the anther to the stigma via wind.
